title: themelium abebaion
side_effects: Themelium abebaion can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and stomach pain due to its high concentration of toxic alkaloids. In severe cases, prolonged use can lead to liver damage, kidney failure, and even respiratory distress. Additionally, improper preparation and dosing of themelium abebaion can cause headaches, dizziness, and fainting, especially in individuals with pre-existing medical conditions. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
